name: web-quality-skills
description: A collection of six agent SKILL.md files for web quality optimization: web-quality-audit, performance, core-web-vitals, accessibility, seo, and best-practices. Based on Google Lighthouse and WCAG 2.1 standards. By Addy Osmani (Google Chrome team). Includes a static HTML analysis shell script.

findings_summary.notes: Excellent quality skill collection by Addy Osmani (Google Chrome team). Six well-structured SKILL.md files with clear descriptions and usage triggers. The single shell script (skills/web-quality-audit/scripts/analyze.sh) is a static HTML analyzer that reads local files and outputs JSON — no network calls, no system modifications, no package installs. Includes reference documentation (WCAG.md, LCP.md) alongside skills. AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md present for agent context. MIT licensed. No hooks, no dangerous patterns. High trust due to authoritative author. Minor gap: no security policy. Best example of clean skill design in this batch.
